Project Initialization (The Walking Skeleton)

Dependencies added: Spring Web (MVC), Spring Data JPA for PostgreSQL, Lombok.
Create cloud database on Neon.tech

User Story—Define the "Slice" Data Model
PostgreSQL Table `slices` created.
Java Entity created using Record types (if suitable) or Data classes.
Unit test verifying a Slice can be saved and retrieved via a Repository .
User Story - Create 24h Visual Canvas
UI renders a circle representing 24 hours (00:00 to 23:59).
Select Flutter radial rendering approach (CustomPainter vs package)
The chart is responsive (resizes correctly on Mobile vs. Desktop).
Visual markers placed at key intervals (e.g., 00:00, 06:00, 12:00, 18:00).
User Story - Drag-to-Create (Touch/Mouse Interaction)
Constraint: Must work on touch devices (Mobile view).
Releasing the click/touch opens the "Edit Slice" modal with times pre-filled.
Dragging defines the duration ( `end_time` ).
User can click a point on the chart to define `start_time` .
